task_completion.description: Calculate unit cost, extended cost, total cost, and cost per serving for each recipe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the spreadsheet (likely on the 'Recipes' sheet), columns for unit cost, extended cost, total cost, and cost per serving are populated with numerical values.

task_completion.description: Create a new sheet named 'Menu_Pricing' with specific headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet tab named 'Menu_Pricing' is visible. The sheet contains the headers: Menu Item, Cost Per Serving, Target Food Cost %, Suggested Price, and Gross Profit.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'Menu_Pricing' sheet with the six recipes and set the Target Food Cost % to 30%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Six recipe rows are listed under the Menu Item column. The 'Target Food Cost %' column displays 30% (or 0.3) for all six recipes.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Suggested Price and Gross Profit for each menu item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Suggested Price' and 'Gross Profit' columns contain calculated numerical values for each of the six recipes.

task_completion.description: Include a bar chart on the 'Menu_Pricing' sheet displaying the Gross Profit per menu item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bar chart is visible on the 'Menu_Pricing' sheet. The chart's labels/categories correspond to the Menu Items, and the bars represent the Gross Profit values.

integrity.description: The agent used a spreadsheet GUI application to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the LibreOffice Calc (or similar spreadsheet) interface open and being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts generating the file in the background.

integrity.description: The chart is a native spreadsheet chart object.
integrity.visual_evidence: The bar chart is embedded directly within the spreadsheet grid, potentially showing chart selection handles or the chart wizard dialog, rather than an external image viewer.

integrity.description: The agent actively interacted with the spreadsheet application to perform calculations and formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active cell selections, data entry in the formula bar, or navigation through spreadsheet menus/dialogs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new sheet name is exactly 'Menu_Pricing'. The target food cost percentage to be used for all recipes is 30% (0.30).
